brief_notes: Follows the same translational structure and covers all key findings. The histology and ANOVA results are presented with comparable numerical detail to the skill version -- this is one of the better baseline papers. However, the TBSS and NIA results lack exact values in some places, the disease duration correlations are described without the specific r and p values in the results text, and the statistics summary table is less informative than dedicated results tables. Overall a solid paper but with moderate gaps in quantitative reporting.
